description: Popular literature, probably. In partially rhymed Judaeo-Arabic. Narrates a painful parting from a friend ("I was left in a difficult state, like he who sits on an ember"). Further down: "Then, one day we drank in the house of a friend... our cupbearer was a black (asmar) man, graceful and elegant..."
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
